code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens_list: List<Int> = []
mut odds_list: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut in_tok = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_tok
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          evens_list = list.push(evens_list, v)
        else
          odds_list = list.push(odds_list, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    if not in_tok
      start = i
      in_tok = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_tok
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      evens_list = list.push(evens_list, v)
    else
      odds_list = list.push(odds_list, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut evens_str = ""
mut evens_first = true
for x in evens_list
  if evens_first
    evens_str = "#{x}"
    evens_first = false
  else
    evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{x}"
  end
end

mut odds_str = ""
mut odds_first = true
for x in odds_list
  if odds_first
    odds_str = "#{x}"
    odds_first = false
  else
    odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{x}"
  end
end

println("evens=#{evens_str}")
println("odds=#{odds_str}")
